design_vibe: Luxurious, Exclusive, Gen-Z, Premium Club, High-Energy

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4. Never use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for body text, descriptions, small labels.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl or backdrop-blur-2xl heavily. Base cards should have bg-white/5 or bg-black/60 with a border-white/10 to create a milled crystal look. DO NOT use fully transparent backgrounds for overlays.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid cheap two-color linear gradients. Use mesh gradients or radial blurs in the background for a soft, glowing aurora effect. E.g., absolute positioned div with bg-purple-600/20 blur-[120px].
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px inner stroke border-white/10 is mandatory on all glass cards to separate them from the background.
visual_enhancers.textures: Apply a subtle noise/grain texture overlay (opacity 2-4%) across the entire app background to kill digital flatness and make it feel premium.

digital_student_card.description: The hero feature. Must feel like an Apple Wallet pass.
digital_student_card.styles: Rounded-3xl, immersive mesh gradient background (deep indigo fading to purple), 3D tilt effect on hover via framer-motion, glowing neon green verified badge. QR code must sit on a pristine white or frosted glass rounded-xl container. Add subtle noise texture.
digital_student_card.interactions: Hover causes slight 3D rotation and dynamic glare effect.

buttons.primary: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). bg-white text-black font-bold hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-200. For primary call-to-actions (e.g., Get Verified).
buttons.secondary: Glass pill. bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 transition-all.

navigation.styles: Floating pill nav at the top (margin-top 24px) or sticky crystal glass header. Must have bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10. NEVER fully transparent. Must be visible on desktop.

offer_cards.styles: rounded-2xl bg-[#0A0A0C] border border-white/5 overflow-hidden group hover:border-white/20 transition-colors. Image takes up top 50%, bottom 50% is content.
offer_cards.interactions: Image scales up slightly (scale-105) on group hover.

grids_and_layouts.general_spacing: Generous. Use p-8, p-12 for sections. Container max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6.
grids_and_layouts.bento_grid: For the 'How it Works' or 'Features' section, use a highly asymmetrical bento grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Mix col-span-8, col-span-4, row-span-2.
grids_and_layouts.dashboard_layout: Sidebar navigation (glass effect) + main content area. High-density grids for data, but ample padding inside cards.

motion.page_transitions: Fade in with a slight upward translation (y: 20 to 0, opacity 0 to 1).
motion.stagger_children: Lists of offers or features must use staggerChildren (0.1s delay) so they flow in sequentially.
motion.micro_interactions: All interactive elements must scale down slightly on active/tap (scale 0.97).
motion.scrolling: Implement Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling on the landing page if applicable, else rely on Framer Motion viewport triggers.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over gradients or images has sufficient contrast. Use text shadows if necessary.
accessibility.focus_states: All focusable elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:outline-none.
accessibility.data_testid: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. E.g., data-testid='verify-student-btn'.

hero_lifestyle.description: Vibrant group of Indian college students celebrating, to be used in the hero section.

cafe_offer.description: Premium coffee/cafe shot for Starbucks/Cafe Coffee Day offer thumbnail.

gym_offer.description: Gen-Z focused gym workout lifestyle shot for fitness deals like Cult.fit.

media.image_treatment: Images in cards must have a max-height (e.g., h-48) and object-cover. Hero images should have a vignette or gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/40 to-transparent) so text is highly legible.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard React (.js/.jsx) with Tailwind CSS. Do NOT use TypeScript.
Install and use 'framer-motion' for all animations, 'lucide-react' for UI icons.
For brand logos (Spotify, Nike, Apple), use Lucide icons in a sleek circular container or SVG logos if you can generate the path. Do not use plain text.
Install and configure 'sonner' for all toast notifications.
Do NOT build generic corporate layouts. Prioritize asymmetry, deep shadows, glow effects, and generous spacing.
The Digital Student Card MUST be a visually distinct, premium component using 3D rotation, holographic gradients, and a clear QR code placeholder.
Ensure the theme is locked to Dark Mode by default, applying bg-black and text-white at the root.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs ('AI slop'). Use creative, distinctive layouts.
Never apply 'transition: all'. Apply transitions to specific properties (e.g., transform, opacity).
Never center align the app container text via `.App { text-align: center; }`.
Use pill-shaped or sharp button styles; never default rectangular buttons without styling.
Never use AI emoji characters (🤖🧠💡) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, focus states).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using existing Shadcn components and customize them to fit the 'Luxurious Gen-Z Dark Mode' aesthetic.
